summary: While the role offers an ideal 9-to-5 schedule with no on-call duties, it is a poor fit because the core cognitive demands—specifically Bayesian statistics and complex genomic analysis—directly conflict with your struggles in math and logical deduction. The high emotional labor and significant legal liability create a high-stress environment that undermines the personal wellbeing you prioritize. Because you excel in procedural, protocol-driven work rather than high-stakes analytical judgment, this career path would likely prove unsustainable for you.
